overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a medieval harbor city at sunset. The character walks from shallow water through wooden docks and cobblestone streets, passing guards and harbor equipment, before entering a shrine-like building with an eternal fire.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow harbor water with wooden docks

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position in the water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow harbor water toward the wooden docks at sunset

entered.detail: medieval city silhouette against the golden sunset with towers and buildings
weathered wooden pier extending into the harbor water
tall wooden masts of sailing ships moored in the harbor

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands in shallow harbor water at sunset, surrounded by the silhouettes of large sailing ships. He begins walking forward onto a wooden dock, with the golden-orange sun illuminating the medieval city skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with harbor crane equipment

events.description: passing under the large wooden harbor crane and rope lift platform

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock passing harbor equipment and cranes

entered.detail: large wooden crane structure with massive wheels and beams
wooden platform suspended by ropes from the crane structure
medieval stone and timber buildings lining the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wooden dock, the character passes a large wooden harbor crane with a suspended rope platform. The sailing ships recede into the background as medieval stone buildings become visible along the right side of the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone harbor street with guard patrol

events.description: encountering a group of guards in red uniforms carrying torches
transitioning from wooden dock to cobblestone path while walking alongside guards

agents.ego_description: walking through the harbor district alongside guards in red uniforms carrying torches

notable_agents.action: guards in red uniforms with helmets carrying lit torches, walking alongside the character

entered.detail: irregular cobblestone street surface along the waterfront
stacks of wooden barrels and crates along the dockside
wooden posts with hanging lanterns illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character encounters guards in red uniforms carrying torches and walks alongside them along a cobblestone path. Medieval stone buildings line the right side while wooden barrels and lantern posts appear along the left, with the harbor crane receding behind.

events.description: approaching the shrine building with ornate arched entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone waterfront promenade away from the guards

entered.detail: ornate building with arched entrance and red-tiled roof, illuminated from within
wooden steps leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the cobblestone waterfront, the character passes wooden stairs and lantern posts while moving away from the guards. A shrine-like building with an arched entrance becomes visible on the right, gradually approaching as the character walks forward.

events.description: entering the shrine building through the stone archway
interior illuminated by the warm glow of the large eternal fire brazier

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the shrine building, walking toward the eternal fire

entered.detail: ornate stone archway entrance with brick patterns
large stone brazier with eternal flames burning brightly
interior walls with brick arches and wooden shelving

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the shrine entrance and steps inside, transitioning from the outdoor harbor to an enclosed space. The scene is illuminated by a large eternal fire burning in a stone brazier, with ornate brick arches and wooden structures visible in the warm firelight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched harbor waters into the warm, enclosed interior of a sacred shrine. It begins with Geralt walking through shallow water at sunset, moving past the silhouettes of sailing ships and onto a wooden dock as the golden-orange light illuminates the medieval city skyline. As the character advances, the sailing ships recede and the environment shifts from wooden piers and harbor cranes to a cobblestone path lined with stone buildings, wooden barrels, and guards carrying torches. The scene then opens further along the waterfront, passing lantern posts and wooden stairs before turning toward an arched entrance on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character inside the shrine, transitioning from the outdoor twilight into a space illuminated by the glow of a large eternal fire burning in a stone brazier.
